data.title: NuLiv Science study shows AstraGin® supports intestinal barrier integrity and probiotic adhesion.
data.description: NuLiv Science, a prominent plant-based nutraceutical ingredients company headquartered in Brea, California, unveiled a recent preclinical study on January 27, 2026. The study focuses on examining the impact of AstraGin®, a patented compound developed from Astragalus, on individuals' well-being. AstraGin® is a product of NuLiv Science geared towards promoting healthier lifestyles.

data.title: Elevra Lithium (ASX: ELV; NASDAQ: ELVR; OTCQB: SYAXF) reports record revenue, profit at NAL amid production outlook adjustment.
data.description: Elevra Lithium Limited, based in Brisbane, Australia, announced on January 28, 2026, that they achieved a milestone by recording their highest-ever quarterly revenue and gross profit at their NAL site. The Company, listed as ELV on ASX, ELVR on NASDAQ, and SYAXF on OTCQB, also updated their production forecast to align with current operational circumstances.

data.title: Southwest now offers assigned seating, a change from its previous system. It was rolled out on Tuesday after listening to customer feedback.
data.description: The airline introduced a new policy on Tuesday in response to passenger feedback. While some customers appreciated the change, others felt that the previous system added to the appeal of the experience.

data.title: Trump's Iowa visit: Farmers, vital to state economy, struggling due to tariffs. Unfulfilled promises.
data.description: Iowa relies heavily on its farmers, who play a crucial role in the state's economy. However, due to President Trump's tariffs, they have been facing significant challenges. The promised "golden age" by the president has not materialized for these farmers.

data.title: Arista Networks added to top watchlist along with 8 other stocks. Updates on best-performing stocks by IBD.
data.description: The latest top-performing stock lists from IBD have been released, featuring additions and removals. Arista Networks has made it onto IBD's strict watchlist, along with eight other stocks that are notable. Stay updated with these updates to make informed investment decisions.

data.title: New digital asset strategy chief named at Morgan Stanley after firm filed three crypto ETFs, despite missing 2024-2025 adoption wave.
data.description: During the period of 2024-2025, Morgan Stanley did not actively participate in the initial phase of institutional cryptocurrency adoption. However, the company made a surprising move by filing for three cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds (ETFs) earlier this month. This unexpected development caught the attention of many in the industry.

data.title: Northeast Indiana Bancorp, Inc. reported $1,774,000 net income in Q4, 2025. ($0.75 per diluted common share).
data.description: In Huntington, Indiana, on January 27, 2026, Northeast Indiana Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of First Federal Savings Bank, reported a net income of $1,774,000, equivalent to $0.75 per diluted common share, for the fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2025. This marks a significant increase when compared to the previous quarter's net income.

data.title: KRAKacquisition Corp prices upsized IPO at $300M, offering 30M units at $10 each, listing on Nasdaq under "KRAQU" on Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: Cheyenne, Wyoming, USA - Jan. 27, 2026 - KRAKacquisition Corp ("Company") has revealed the pricing for its initial public offering of 30,000,000 units at $10.00 each. These units will commence trading on the Nasdaq Global Market in the United States under the ticker symbol "KRAQU" starting January 28, 2026. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-fourth of a redeemable warrant. The warrant allows the holder to buy one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share. Once trading separately, the Company foresees the Class A ordinary shares and warrants to be listed on Nasdaq as "KRAQ" and "KRAQW," respectively. The closing of this initial public offering is expected on January 29, 2026, pending customary closing conditions.
